overall.description: First-person exploration gameplay through an opulent Victorian mansion interior. The player character discovers a body on the upper floor, descends a grand staircase lined with artwork, encounters guards in the main lobby, and explores decorated inner chambers featuring a large central plant arrangement.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper floor reception hallway with balcony overlook

events.description: discovers a motionless body lying face down on the wooden floor ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper floor hallway and approaching a body on the ground near the railing

entered.detail: wooden reception counter with bottles and items on top, backed by railing
large ornate circular ceiling light fixture with multiple bulbs
motionless person in dark clothing lying face down on the floor
dark wood and metal balcony railing overlooking lower floor

segments.scene_description: The player explores an upper floor hallway with green walls and wooden floors, passing a reception desk and discovering a body lying near the balcony railing. The space is dimly lit by an ornate chandelier, with red armchairs visible against the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with portrait gallery walls

events.description: turns toward and begins descending the grand staircase
lighting shifts creating dramatic shadows on the gallery wall while descending

agents.ego_description: walking down the grand staircase while observing the framed artwork on the walls

entered.detail: wide staircase with red carpet runner descending to the lower floor
wall covered with multiple framed black and white photographs and portraits
large potted tree on the stairwell landing

segments.scene_description: The player descends a grand staircase lined with a gallery of framed black and white photographs. The wooden railing shifts to the right side as the camera moves downward, passing a large potted tree on the landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: main lobby with marble floors and support columns

events.description: two guards become visible standing in the lobby ahead
reaches bottom of stairs and continues forward into the lobby space

agents.ego_description: reaching the ground floor lobby and approaching guards while moving toward the inner chambers

notable_agents.action: guard standing still facing away from the camera near the center of the lobby
second guard standing near the far doorway observing the room

entered.detail: large circular chandelier with multiple lamps hanging from the high ceiling
tall stone support column with ornate capital
folding room divider with floral pattern and wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The player enters the spacious ground floor lobby with marble floors and tall columns, encountering two guards standing near the center. A large chandelier hangs overhead as the camera moves past a decorative folding screen toward the inner rooms.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner chamber with large decorative plant centerpiece

events.description: enters inner room featuring a large circular plant arrangement with surrounding chairs
slows and stops while approaching the large double doors at the end of the room

agents.ego_description: moving through the inner chambers toward a set of large double doors, observing the central plant display

entered.detail: tall silver metallic tree or plant surrounded by four red armchairs on a circular rug
large wooden double doors with glass panels and ornate handles
tufted red leather armchairs arranged in a circle around the central plant

segments.scene_description: The player enters an inner chamber dominated by a large decorative silver plant surrounded by red leather armchairs on a circular rug. The camera moves slowly toward a set of large wooden double doors at the far end of the marble-floored room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit upper hallway down into the opulent, expansive chambers of a Victorian mansion. It begins by navigating a green-walled corridor past a reception desk and red armchairs, eventually discovering a body lying near a balcony railing under an ornate chandelier. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts to a descent down a grand staircase lined with black and white photographs, passing a large potted tree on the landing. The movement then opens into a spacious ground floor lobby with marble floors and tall columns, gliding past two guards and a decorative folding screen. Finally, the camera enters an inner chamber dominated by a large silver plant and red leather armchairs on a circular rug before drifting toward a set of large wooden double doors.
